ValidationRule.description: Display & Mandatory ONLY if IsSeeded=True > Bloc le save quelque soit la phase (a supprimer?)
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISNEW()) , NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c), $Permission.PRPProductStrategy = true, RecordType.DeveloperName = 'SetUp', ISPICKVAL(ProjectShareclasses__r.ProjectProduct__r.IsSeeded__c, 'true'), OR(ISBLANK(TEXT(SeedCurrency__c)), ISBLANK(SeedAmount__c)))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: If "Is Seeded" on the product project = true, please provide values for Seed Amount and Seed Currency.
